official_policy.headline_description: Headline official baselines come from dev/dev50/test suites.
official_policy.sanity_description: Official dev10/quick runs are sanity checks for harness health.

entries.cli_command: .venv/bin/python -m mentor_worker_benchmark run --task-pack task_pack_v2 --suite quick --seed 1337 --max-turns 1 --timeout 90 --worker-num-predict 256 --mentor-num-predict 128 --run-modes worker_only,mentor_worker --worker-model deepseek-coder:6.7b --mentor-model llama3.1:8b --results-path results/community_quick_multiseed_deepseekcoder67b_llama318b_2026-03-03.json

.venv/bin/python -m mentor_worker_benchmark run --task-pack task_pack_v2 --suite quick --seed 1337 --max-turns 1 --timeout 90 --worker-num-predict 256 --mentor-num-predict 128 --run-modes worker_only,mentor_worker --worker-model qwen2.5-coder:7b --mentor-model mistral:7b --results-path results/community_quick_multiseed_qwen25coder7b_mistral7b_2026-03-03.json

python -m mentor_worker_benchmark run --task-pack task_pack_v2 --suite explicit --models gemma2:9b,phi3:mini --run-modes worker_only,mentor_worker --seed 1337 --max-turns 2 --results-path results/results.json --provider ollama --mentor-models gemma2:9b --worker-models phi3:mini --repro

python -m mentor_worker_benchmark run --task-pack task_pack_v2 --suite explicit --models llama3.1:8b,phi3:mini --run-modes worker_only,mentor_worker --seed 1337 --max-turns 2 --results-path results/results.json --provider ollama --mentor-models llama3.1:8b --worker-models phi3:mini --repro

python -m mentor_worker_benchmark run --task-pack task_pack_v2 --suite explicit --models mistral:7b,qwen2.5-coder:7b --run-modes worker_only,mentor_worker --seed 1337 --max-turns 2 --results-path results/results.json --provider ollama --mentor-models mistral:7b --worker-models qwen2.5-coder:7b --repro

python -m mentor_worker_benchmark run --task-pack task_pack_v2 --suite explicit --models llama3.1:8b,qwen2.5-coder:7b --run-modes worker_only,mentor_worker --seed 1337 --max-turns 2 --results-path results/results.json --provider ollama --mentor-models llama3.1:8b --worker-models qwen2.5-coder:7b --repro

python -m mentor_worker_benchmark run --task-pack task_pack_v2 --suite dev10 --models llama3.1:8b,qwen2.5-coder:7b --run-modes worker_only,mentor_worker --seed 1337 --max-turns 2 --results-path results/results.json --provider ollama --mentor-models llama3.1:8b --worker-models qwen2.5-coder:7b
